case_title: GARY CAMPBELL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK STROTHER, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (JASON HOWARD - WELLS FARGO - SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED MAY-01-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, GARY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL JASON HOWARD (BRANCH MANAGER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FAROOQ IMAM WELLS FARGO BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-01-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STROTHER, JAMES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JAMES STROTHER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANA GUTIERREZ--OPERATIONS RISK CONSULTANT/VICE PRESIDENT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT STROTHER, JAMES

DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
